title: 2021-2026 Toyota Sienna JBL Subwoofer Back Door Speaker Removal, Testing & Installation Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to testing and replacement procedure of the power back door #3 speaker/subwoofer for the 12-speaker JBL sound system. Please help support my channel by making any purchase using the following affiliate links for which I may receive a small commission, or use the Super Thanks button to donate to the channel directly.
